context: Novelty and reality TV ruled. Tony Christie's 1971 'Amarillo' was resurrected by Peter Kay for Comic Relief and became a cultural phenomenon. The Crazy Frog battled Coldplay for number one. X Factor produced its first major force in Shayne Ward.

tracks.title: Don't Cha
tracks.artist: The Pussycat Dolls feat. Busta Rhymes

tracks.title: All About You / You've Got a Friend
